/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/pqbench.dir/pqbench_app/pqbench.c.o CMakeFiles/pqbench.dir/picoquicfirst/getopt.c.o -o pqbench  ../../../_deps/picotls-build/libpicotls-core.a ../../../_deps/picotls-build/libpicotls-openssl.a ../../../_deps/picotls-build/libpicotls-minicrypto.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.1/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.1/lib/libcrypto.dylib libpicoquic-log.a libpicoquic-core.a libpicohttp-core.a libpicoquic-core.a ../../../_deps/picotls-build/libpicotls-openssl.a ../../../_deps/picotls-build/libpicotls-minicrypto.a ../../../_deps/picotls-build/libpicotls-core.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.1/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.1/lib/libcrypto.dylib
